ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings received */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie's director */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie's writer */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie's producer */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "plot_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie's plot */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie's poster */,
  "released_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the movie */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie's production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the rating was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating was submitted anonymously */,
  "rating_comment" TEXT /* Short comment with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review submitted by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the review was created */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review was submitted anonymously */,
  "is_spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user for the review */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Horror, Comedy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "franchises" (
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each franchise */,
  "franchise_name" TEXT /* Name of the franchise (e.g., The Mummy Series) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the franchise */,
  "original_release_year" INTEGER /* Year the franchise was first released */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Name of the franchise creator */,
  "franchise_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the franchise's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("franchise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_franchises" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the franchise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "franchise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie added to the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the watchlist is public or private */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the admin */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the admin */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the admin's profile picture */,
  "is_super_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the admin is a super admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the admin's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)
